property.name: configDevName
property.label: Config Developer Name
property.description: DeveloperName of the config to load

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id (optional)
property.description: Current record Id to use in filter

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: Input Type
propertyType.description: Generic sObject data type used for input sObject properties

property.name: isFlowContext
property.label: Use Flow Data?
property.description: Check this to use data from Flow input instead of querying Apex
